news.t: Global X Announces Five ETF Reverse Stock Splits
Clean energy will be a top theme in ETFs this year, market analysts say

holdings.infoBox: CTEC is an equity ETF with a total of 45 individual holdings. The top holdings are Bloom Energy stock at 8.74%, First Solar at 7.14%, Samsung SDI at 6.93%, Contemporary Amperex Technology at 5.80%, and Nextpower at 5.55%.

overview.description: The Global X ClimateTech ETF (CTEC) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Indxx Global ClimateTech index. The fund tracks a market-cap weighted index of global companies involved in the development and production of technologies that reduce negative impact on the environment. CTEC was launched on Oct 27, 2020 and is issued by Global X.

data.title: Global X Announces Five ETF Reverse Stock Splits
data.text: NEW YORK, Aug. 18, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Global X Management Company, LLC ("Global X"), the New York-based provider of exchange traded funds (ETFs), today announced reverse splits of the following five...

data.title: Earth friendly ETFs
data.text: Earth Day celebrations can include selecting the best ETF's that focus on climate change.

data.title: Clean energy will be a top theme in ETFs this year, market analysts say
data.text: From clean energy to cloud computing, thematic ETFs are set to continue their explosive growth in the new year, three market analysts say.

data.title: As thematic investing grows, these ETFs could win out: Market analysts
data.text: Jay Jacobs of Global X ETFs, Todd Rosenbluth of CFRA Research and Anna Paglia of Invesco discuss the thematic ETFs that could dominate in the new year and under a Biden administration.
